---
title: "COHESIFY: The impact of Cohesion Policy on EU Identity (G.A. no. 693427)"
date: "2018"
year: "2018"
funder: "Horizon 2020, REFLECTIVE-SOCIETY-2015, European Commission"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
---

COHESIFY: The impact of Cohesion Policy on EU Identity (G.A. no. 693427)
